steps.title: Identify the time sequence
steps.content: The passage first says the soldiers' contribution was overlooked for decades. The next sentence moves forward to 2017, when lawmakers created a day of recognition.

steps.title: Use the next-event transition
steps.content: "Then" marks what happened later in time: recognition followed decades of neglect. A signals the last item in a list, C signals similarity, and D introduces an example, so they misstate the relationship. The answer is B.
